CustomField.description: Agency abbreviation from CE Explorer (e.g., DOI - BLM, DOE, FERC, DOD - USACE). Matches the unit field in the CE Explorer dataset. Used for list-view filtering and Experience Cloud faceted search.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Agency abbreviation (e.g., DOI - BLM, DOE, FERC).
CustomField.label: Agency Abbreviation
